channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping on the path leading to Warren Fields., 25th March
item.description:
Fly tipping on the path leading to Warren Fields.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Calmont Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside of 7-15 st Francis rd da81as, 25th March
item.description:
Hyde housing has had contractors in for work on ground floor flat. Thay have just left sll this rubbish outside the block. Since Monday. It has fibre glass insulation. It had now blown all over the place. As in pictures . Have called Hyde but ( closed for training!”

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Fidelis Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dartmouth Road Cricklewood jucntion of Walm lane, 25th March
item.description:
Ongoing water leak at Dartmouth Rd junction with Warm Lane, Cricklewood for the past couple of weeks. Water running along the road daily — significant waste and potential hazard. @ThamesWater please investigate and repair urgently.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mapesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at side of my property, 25th March
item.description:
Fly tipping at side of my property of branches, concrete and logs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Wateringbury Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tons of waste on mina road, 25th March
item.description:
Corner of OKR and mina road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 288, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fast food & packaging dumped in street by uber driver, 25th March
item.description:
Fast food & packaging dumped in street by uber driver

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bannockburn road opposite shop, constantly covered in litter, 25th March
item.description:
Bannockburn road constantly covered in litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bannockburn Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wall could collapse across pavement, 25th March
item.description:
The wall to this front garden has been precarious for some time. A large amount of earth has been moved onto the front garden. This is pushing onto the garden wall making it lean towards the pavement. This could collapse onto the pavement at any time making it a hazard to pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kechill Gardens, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 25th March
item.description:
Fly tipping on Wellington Road, please can we get this removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Wellington Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Single mattress and divan dumped on grass verge, 25th March
item.description:
Again, 4th fly tipping by same people and you aren’t doing anything but collect stuff for free!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaxtol Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on boards outside old Poundland store, 25th March
item.description:
There is red graffiti all along the wooden boards outside the former Poundland shop. Looks very unsightly right in the middle of the high street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 143-151, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes blocking emergency exit, 25th March
item.description:
Honor Oak Park station SE23. I wasn’t sure which category to use for this. ‘Abandoned Lime bikes’ was closest. These bikes are blocking the emergency exit from the Honor Oak Park station platform. There are two signs showing it is an emergency exit. My photo shows one. Admittedly these are faded and loose. Maybe London Overground and Lime could look into this…? What if there was an emergency?? This exit has had to be used while I’ve been in this area (pre-Lime)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honor Oak Park, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bags and pram, 25th March
item.description:
Bags and a pram have been dumped outside the Charity shop and there are clothes everywhere
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all along Walworth Road, 25th March
item.description:
It's normally not the tidiest but the amount of rubbish on Walworth Road this morning was frankly disgusting. It was everywhere. All sorts of rubbish including a dead pidgeon wing. This was the whole way down the street. It was not like this in Dulwich, Camberwell nor nearer to Elephant / Waterloo. I ran the length of the road, I have never complained about something like this before but people shouldn't have to face that when off to work.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 181,183, Walworth Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest bike dumped in road, v dangerous, 25th March
item.description:
There's a Forest hire bike on its side right in the street, next to the electrical business on Green Lane, SE20. Could be a hazard to drivers and cyclists.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pot holes, 25th March
item.description:
Two potholes have been there for approx 6 months and are getting larger. They are outside 24 Rowley Avenue. This is an extremely busy road which is adding to the potholes increasing in size

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Rowley Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More household waste dumped by public bin, 25th March
item.description:
This is now happening every few days, seems like local residents are using the pavement by this public bin for dumping their household waste, posing a potential environmental health threat (rats etc). Could a 'no flytipping' sign be added nearby maybe?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bycroft Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Pallet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gateley Road, Brixton, Greater London
